title: Rental Inspection Checklist Template
summary: Build a practical rental inspection checklist in one step, copy/save it, and export a structured CSV.

entries.title: Rental inspection checklist template
entries.first_action: Open the page, enter property details, choose a check path, review the generated checklist, then copy or export it.
entries.smoke_test: Load https://dayonebuilder.online/rental-inspection-checklist-template/, click Build checklist, then click Copy checklist and Download CSV.
entries.proof_signal: Official checklist references are shown with transparent assumptions and measurable completion/export events.
entries.fallback: Use official source URLs directly if your lease demands a region- or landlord-specific template first.
entries.install_or_save_intent: Save the generated checklist text as a local draft or install/save event from the page action row.
